entities.name: SMALLHOLDER VALUE CHAINS
entities.description: Dynamic systems involving small-scale farmers and the process of adding value to products

entities.name: COMPLEX ADAPTIVE SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems characterized by a large number of interacting components that adapt and change over time

entities.name: SHOCKS
entities.description: Sudden, unpredictable events that force systems to adapt

entities.name: TURBULENT MARKETS
entities.description: Unstable market environments that affect the competitiveness of value chains

entities.name: CONCEPTUAL FRAMEWORK
entities.description: A structured approach developed to understand value chain performance based on complex adaptive systems theory

entities.name: TIME
entities.description: A property of complex systems affecting value chain dynamics

entities.name: UNCERTAINTY
entities.description: A property of complex systems affecting value chain dynamics

entities.name: SENSITIVITY TO INITIAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: A property of complex systems where small changes can lead to large effects

entities.name: ENDOGENOUS SHOCKS
entities.description: Internal shocks within a system that drive change

entities.name: SUDDEN CHANGE
entities.description: Rapid shifts in system state or structure

entities.name: INTERACTING AGENTS
entities.description: Entities within a system that influence each other's behavior

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: The process by which value chains adjust to shocks and changes to remain competitive
